Title: Requires all certified first responders, emergency medical technicians, and advanced emergency medical technicians to undergo criminal background checks
Summary: Requires all certified first responders, emergency medical technicians, and advanced emergency medical technicians to undergo criminal background checks to maintain their certification.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public health law, in relation to requiring all certified first responders, emergency medical technicians, and advanced emergency medical technicians to undergo criminal background checks
